articles.title: FEATURE ADOPTION, AND OTHER KPIS
articles.summary: See how peer companies are performing across 9 modern product KPIs! This report by Mind the Product is based on data from 6,800+ applications [4] using the Pendo One platform.

articles.title: 📥 Get the full report to see how your product compares
PIVOT POINTS
articles.summary: When creating effective strategies for leading a fulfilling life, it's crucial to align them with "Pivot Points," which are key truths or principles that shape decisions. This involves ensuring that strategies are reinforcing these points, leveraging multiple points for differentiation, and addressing contradictions or potential inaccuracies within them for consistency and success.

articles.title: HOW PERPLEXITY'S GROWTH IS CHANGING SEARCH HABITS
HANDS ON WITH META'S NEW ORION AUGMENTED REALITY GLASSES
articles.summary: We're likely to adopt AR glasses once they're stylish, affordable, and widely available. Meta is pushing this vision to reduce reliance on Apple and Android, having invested billions in its Reality Labs. While phones may represent the peak of device evolution, Meta's Orion marks a promising start for AR's future.

articles.title: THE FUTURE OF SEO IS USER-GENERATED CONTENT
articles.summary: Future SEO and content strategy will prioritize user-generated content (UGC) over company-produced material. While AI excels at generating common answers, authentic, niche UGC stands out. Featuring user content not only breaks through the noise, but also encourages users to share with their networks, creating a social loop that enhances brand visibility, loyalty, and retention.

articles.title: THE POETRY OF A GOOD VISION
articles.summary: A clear vision is essential for maximizing productivity as it aligns employees around a common goal. While a vision may only resonate with some, that's its strength — it helps streamline hiring. Focus on bringing in people who are motivated by your vision, as they're more likely to go the extra mile. Don't aim to please everyone; be bold. Those who love your vision will more than compensate for those who don't.

articles.title: HOW TO BE STRATEGIC
articles.summary: Many people aim to do "high-level strategy work," focusing on big, rare decisions, but the more abundant and impactful strategic work involves making numerous smaller, faster decisions that refine and implement these larger choices. Success in this type of work requires developing intuition, generating insights, proposing solutions, and synthesizing everything into clear, actionable plans.

articles.title: SCOPING AND SHAPING MINI-BOOK
articles.summary: This mini-book offers a deep dive into concepts like drivers constraints and floats through thought experiments, models, and activities. Originally a companion to a workshop, it now serves as a standalone resource for applying these ideas in professional settings.

articles.title: THE POWER OF MENTORSHIP
articles.summary: Self-improvement tools are useful, but nothing beats a mentor's guidance. Their wisdom offers insights that books can't match and is crucial for career growth. Actively seek out and nurture mentorship, as it requires effort and a willingness to step outside your comfort zone.

articles.title: EXECUTIVE POTENTIAL MEANS SHIFTING THE ALTITUDE OF THE CONVERSATION
articles.summary: This VP, who was aiming for promotion, was overlooked because he focused too much on his team's scope rather than the broader company perspective. By reframing his approach to align with company-level goals, such as profitability and accountability, he demonstrated stronger executive potential and gained credibility with senior leadership.

articles.title: COMPARING AREAS OF FRICTION AND DRAG
articles.summary: Teams often raise issues without fully exploring their assumptions, long-term effects, or solutions.

articles.title: FIVE BOOKS THAT HAVE SHAPED MY CAREER
articles.summary: A PM's success hinges on more than technical expertise — it's about building trust, measuring impact, and challenging assumptions.
